changelog.title: Latest updates
changelog.heat_details: {LINK} is a Twitch extensions allowing viewers to click on your stream. Twitchat makes it dead easy to use it.

highlights.d:
It's finally possible to pin chat messages from Twitchat!

Simply right click a message and click "Pin Message", or use /pin command.

forceRead.title:
I WANT YOU
TO READ THIS
forceRead.description: I worked hard on these updates, please take 2 minutes of your time to read them 🙏
forceRead.readAtSpeedOfLight: Are you trying to make me believe that you read at the speed of light 😏?
